summary: TypeScript code excellent: explicit types, proper async/await, graceful error handling, dependency injection. Workflow has two issues: (1) Summarize step repeats identical JSON parsing 4 times (lines 33–36)—should refactor to single jq/awk command; (2) hardcoded env vars reference test-case/ paths instead of using checked-in fixtures or workflow inputs. Actionlint validation not shown. Exit code strategy (set +e) works but undocumented.
